expectations.evidence: Starts with '# INVESTIGATIVNA SPRAVA: YEMANITY s.r.o. (ICO 55002072)'. Follows deep dive template with CONFIRMED, INCONCLUSIVE, Schema, Klucove otazky sections.
NACE 70220 — 'Poradenske cinnosti v oblasti riadenia' vs 'klasicke stavebne projekty'. Says 'Toto NIE su poradenske sluzby — su to zmluvy o dielo na konkretne stavebne prace.'
ASCII diagram shows EUBA at top (625 252 EUR), YEMANITY center, Obec Skalite and Mesto Zilina branching below. Includes persons Jan Sutiak and Filip Sobol.
All 6 contracts have CRZ URLs in the Dokazy table: crz.gov.sk/zmluva/11889441/ through crz.gov.sk/zmluva/12059873/
Two INCONCLUSIVE sections: 'Povodna zmluva 802/2025' and 'Kupna zmluva s Obcou Stara Bystrica', both with 'Co nevieme' and 'Dalsie kroky' subsections.
